Home / Services / Drylining Contractors

Expert Drylining Contractors in Edinburgh

Professional drylining installation for homes and businesses across Edinburgh. Smooth finishes, fast turnaround, and quality you can trust.

TL;DR: Professional drylining and plasterboard installation for walls and ceilings across Edinburgh and the Lothians. CSCS-registered operatives, free quotes, and 12-month workmanship guarantee.

What Our Drylining Service Includes

Our drylining service is tailored to domestic and commercial clients across Edinburgh and surrounding areas. We combine quality materials, skilled tradesmen, and efficient project management to deliver results that last.

  • Site survey and measurement
  • Plasterboard cutting and fitting
  • Timber and metal stud frame construction
  • Professional taping and jointing
  • Corner bead and trim installation
  • Insulation-backed drylining for thermal upgrades
  • Soundproofing solutions for noise reduction
  • Fire-rated plasterboard for safety compliance
  • Full cleanup and waste removal

Why Choose Our Drylining Contractors?

  • CSCS-registered team: All our drylining operatives hold valid CSCS cards and are fully insured for domestic and commercial work.
  • 15+ years experience: We have completed drylining projects ranging from single rooms to multi-floor commercial fit-outs.
  • Free, detailed quotes: No obligation site visits with clear breakdowns of labour, materials, and timeline.
  • Building regulation compliance: We ensure all work meets Part L thermal efficiency and Part B fire safety standards.
  • Fast turnaround: Drylining is significantly faster than wet plastering, reducing project downtime.

Materials & Specifications

We use industry-leading products from trusted manufacturers to ensure durability, compliance, and a premium finish.

  • British Gypsum Gyproc plasterboard (standard, moisture-resistant, fire-rated, soundbloc)
  • Knauf plasterboard and jointing systems
  • Metal C-studs and U-tracks (50mm, 70mm, 92mm profiles)
  • Gyproc drywall adhesive for dot and dab applications
  • Joint compound, paper tape, and scrim tape
  • Insulation-backed plasterboard (Celotex, Kingspan, Rockwool)
  • Fire-rated intumescent sealants and cavity barriers

Applications & Use Cases

Our drylining services are suitable for a wide range of building types and project sizes across Edinburgh.

  • New build residential properties and housing estates
  • Home renovations, extensions, and loft conversions
  • Commercial office fit-outs and refurbishments
  • Retail shop fitting and display wall construction
  • School and education building upgrades
  • Healthcare and care home interior works
  • Industrial unit partitioning and warehouse linings

How It Works

  1. Free Quote: Call or fill in our form. We will assess your project and provide a detailed, no-obligation quote.
  2. Detailed Plan: We confirm materials, timeline, and specifications. No hidden extras - everything is agreed upfront.
  3. Professional Installation: Our CSCS-registered team works cleanly, efficiently, and to the highest standards.
  4. Quality Check & Handover: We inspect every detail, ensure compliance, and leave your space ready for the next stage.

Frequently Asked Questions about Drylining

What is drylining?

Drylining is the process of fixing plasterboard to interior walls and ceilings without using wet plaster. It is faster, cleaner, and provides a smooth finish ready for decorating or painting.

How long does drylining take?

A typical room takes 1-2 days depending on size and complexity. Whole-property drylining can take 1-2 weeks. We will give you a clear timeline during your quote.

Is drylining cheaper than traditional plastering?

Drylining is generally more cost-effective than wet plastering for large areas. It requires less drying time, less labour, and produces minimal mess.

Can drylining include insulation?

Yes. We install insulation-backed plasterboard to improve thermal performance and meet Part L building regulations.

Do you provide a guarantee?

Yes. All our drylining work comes with a 12-month workmanship guarantee. We also use manufacturer-guaranteed materials from British Gypsum and Knauf.

Is drylining suitable for bathrooms?

Yes, when moisture-resistant plasterboard is used. We also recommend appropriate tanking in high-moisture areas.

What areas do you cover?

We provide drylining services across Edinburgh, Leith, Livingston, Dalkeith, Musselburgh, Falkirk, and all surrounding Lothians and Central Scotland areas.
